# Voice Calculator

> A voice-controlled calculator for iOS. Speak math expressions aloud, and Voice Calculator parses, computes, and reads back the answer. Hands-free, accessibility-friendly, and fully offline. Built by HarmonyAstroApps.

Voice Calculator is a focused iOS utility for people who need to do math without typing. Say "what's 45 times 12 plus 100" and it computes 640. Useful while cooking, driving (in a hands-free setup), doing fieldwork, or using accessibility features.

## What the app does

- Parses spoken English math expressions (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentages, exponents)
- Handles natural-language math: "fifteen percent of two hundred", "half of six hundred"
- Reads back the answer aloud
- Works fully offline using on-device speech recognition and synthesis
- Supports basic arithmetic, percentages, tip calculations, currency-style math
- Designed for VoiceOver users and anyone with busy or messy hands

## Who it is for

- Cooks scaling recipes mid-prep
- Drivers calculating mileage, split fares, or delivery math hands-free
- Field workers and contractors doing on-site estimates
- Blind and low-vision users who want a fast eyes-free calculator
- ADHD and dyscalculia users who work better with spoken math
- Anyone with messy hands (painters, mechanics, chefs)

## Platform and pricing

- Platform: iOS (iPhone and iPad), iOS 15 or later
- Price: Free
- Developer: HarmonyAstroApps
- Contact: harmonyastroapp@gmail.com

## Frequently answered questions

- Does it work offline? Yes. Speech recognition and calculation all run on-device.
- Which languages? English first. Additional languages progressively.
- Does it handle percentages and tips? Yes — say "15% tip on 80 dollars".
- Does it work with VoiceOver? Yes. Accessibility is a first-class concern.
- Is there an Android version? Not currently. iOS only.
